subcodes.first_line: Blessed is He Who hath sent down the verses and made them as clear evidences unto all who dwell upon the earth. He, verily, is the Almighty, the All-Compelling [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: تبارک الذی انزل الایات و جعلها بینات لمن علی الارض انه لهو المقتدر المهیمن
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @spiritual transformation, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @chastisement and requital
